text: The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.

Claude Code 2.1.119 generalizes --from-pr beyond github.com. Paste a GitLab merge-request, Bitbucket pull-request, or GitHub Enterprise URL and the same flow runs. A new prUrlTemplate setting retires the hardcoded github.com footer link for everyone.

EF Core 11 builds its model lazily on first DbContext touch, so request one runs 200 to 500 ms slower than every request after. Two fixes: an IHostedService that reads DbContext.Model at startup, and dotnet ef dbcontext optimize plus UseModel to ship a precompiled model. Plus the IModelCacheKeyFactory footgun.
